summary: FTP directory listing exposes sensitive files
body:
/ftp/ directory listing enabled, exposes files:
- acquisitions.md - confidential business acquisition plans
- announcement_encrypted.md - encrypted announcement
- incident-support.kdbx - KeePass database (downloadable binary)
- legal.md - legal info
- coupons_2013.md.bak (403 only .md/.pdf)
- encrypt.pyc (403)
- eastere.gg (403)
- suspicious_errors.yml (403)
- package.json.bak (403)
- package-lock.json.bak (403)
File server restricts to .md and .pdf but kdbx bypassed check.
